viii. Owing to substantial compliance with this Court’s subsequent 
order dated 08.01.2025, the contempt proceedings are hereby 
dropped.
42. The instant appeal is allowed in the above terms.
43. Ordered accordingly. Pending applications if any, also stand disposed 
of. 
44. Before parting, we would like to seize this opportunity and place 
on record our profound appreciation and gratitude for the team at 
NIMHANS, Bengaluru, for accommodating our time-bound request to 
assess Aadith and Arjun and aiding us in this exercise of adjudicating 
this delicate and complicated dispute.
Result of the case: Appeal allowed.
